Licensed child care in Surrey

2 licensed facilities. The status chip reflects each facility's most recent health authority inspection.

Maple Lane PreschoolCompliantPreschool (30 Months to School Age) · 15340 88 Ave · Capacity 20 Stonebridge Out-of-School CareCompliantGroup Child Care (School Age) · 6350 142 St · Capacity 28
CareCheck BC republishes public licensing and inspection information for convenience. It is not affiliated with the Province of BC or any health authority. Always verify details with the facility and the official provincial resources before making care decisions.
